Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-25 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data reveals two exceptional long-term performers dominating the ranking. LINC ranks #1 with a score of 95.2, posting extraordinary returns across all timeframes—1,441.94% over 10 years, 552.64% over 5 years, and 166.76% over 1 year—while outperforming SPY by 1,218.88 percentage points over the decade and passing all four momentum ratio thresholds with strong technical confirmation (all SMA levels above price). ISSC ranks #2 with similarly impressive absolute returns of 891.73% (10y) and 273.7% (1y), notably outperforming SPY by 668.67% over 10 years, though it shows a weaker momentum structure in the 5-year period (ratio_5y_1y of only 1.07) and failed to maintain above the 30-day moving average. Both stocks demonstrate sustained secular strength, but LINC's cleaner momentum signal (0.74), confirmed volatility ratio (1.729), and consistent outperformance across all comparison periods mark it as the more robust candidate from a long-term momentum perspective. The data appears incomplete for ISSC's additional metrics, limiting full comparative analysis.
